field.name: available_currency_ids
field.eval: [Command.set([ ref('base.USD'), ref('base.CAD'), ref('base.CHF'), ref('base.BRL'), ref('base.CNY'), ref('base.PAB'), ref('base.PLN'), ref('base.AUD'), ref('base.RON'), ref('base.TRY'), ref('base.MXN'), ref('base.MYR'), ref('base.PHP'), ref('base.SGD'), ref('base.MUR'), ref('base.HNL'), ref('base.XCD'), ref('base.AWG'), ref('base.AZN'), ref('base.BSD'), ref('base.BHD'), ref('base.BBD'), ref('base.BYN'), ref('base.BZD'), ref('base.BMD'), ref('base.BTN'), ref('base.BAM'), ref('base.BWP'), ref('base.KYD'), ref('base.CUP'), ref('base.ANG'), ref('base.XCG'), ref('base.ERN'), ref('base.ETB'), ref('base.FKP'), ref('base.FJD'), ref('base.GEL'), ref('base.GIP'), ref('base.HTG'), ref('base.JOD'), ref('base.KES'), ref('base.LSL'), ref('base.LYD'), ref('base.MWK'), ref('base.MVR'), ref('base.MDL'), ref('base.MAD'), ref('base.BND'), ref('base.GHS'), ref('base.GMD'), ref('base.MZN'), ref('base.NAD'), ref('base.NIO'), ref('base.KPW'), ref('base.ZMW'), ref('base.EUR'), ref('base.AED'), ref('base.TMT'), ref('base.TND'), ref('base.TTD'), ref('base.TOP'), ref('base.SZL'), ref('base.SRD'), ref('base.SDG'), ref('base.GBP'), ref('base.SLE'), ref('base.SCR'), ref('base.SAR'), ref('base.SHP'), ref('base.QAR'), ref('base.PGK'), ref('base.OMR'), ref('base.GTQ') ])]

field.name: available_currency_ids
field.eval: [Command.set([ ref('base.CHF'), ref('base.BRL'), ref('base.COP'), ref('base.CZK'), ref('base.DKK'), ref('base.HUF'), ref('base.IDR'), ref('base.NOK'), ref('base.PLN'), ref('base.SEK'), ref('base.ARS'), ref('base.INR'), ref('base.UAH'), ref('base.VND'), ref('base.RON'), ref('base.RUB'), ref('base.TRY'), ref('base.MXN'), ref('base.PHP'), ref('base.ZAR'), ref('base.MUR'), ref('base.XOF'), ref('base.UGX'), ref('base.HNL'), ref('base.UYU'), ref('base.AOA'), ref('base.AMD'), ref('base.AWG'), ref('base.AZN'), ref('base.BDT'), ref('base.BYN'), ref('base.BOB'), ref('base.BAM'), ref('base.BWP'), ref('base.KHR'), ref('base.CDF'), ref('base.CUP'), ref('base.ANG'), ref('base.XCG'), ref('base.DOP'), ref('base.ETB'), ref('base.GEL'), ref('base.ILS'), ref('base.KZT'), ref('base.KES'), ref('base.KGS'), ref('base.LSL'), ref('base.MKD'), ref('base.MGA'), ref('base.MWK'), ref('base.MRU'), ref('base.MDL'), ref('base.MNT'), ref('base.MAD'), ref('base.DZD'), ref('base.GHS'), ref('base.GMD'), ref('base.MZN'), ref('base.MMK'), ref('base.NAD'), ref('base.ALL'), ref('base.NIO'), ref('base.KPW'), ref('base.ZIG'), ref('base.ZMW'), ref('base.YER'), ref('base.EUR'), ref('base.VUV'), ref('base.UZS'), ref('base.AED'), ref('base.TZS'), ref('base.TJS'), ref('base.TWD'), ref('base.SYP'), ref('base.SZL'), ref('base.SRD'), ref('base.SDG'), ref('base.LKR'), ref('base.SCR'), ref('base.RSD'), ref('base.SAR'), ref('base.STD'), ref('base.PEN'), ref('base.CVE'), ref('base.GTQ'), ref('base.VES'), ref('base.STN') ])]
